item.title: Under Armour's Attack on Nike | Signature Sneakers
item.description: When Michael Jordan signed with an upstart running shoe company called Nike in the 1980s, it revolutionized the signature sneaker landscape and made Nike the brand to beat. Under Armour made a similar play signing Steph Curry in 2013. But it didn’t pan out quite the way they hoped. Still, nowadays it seems like every star athlete needs a signature line. Tim Newcomb is a sneaker and sports tech reporter whose work has appeared in Forbes, Sports Illustrated, Esquire and more... Feed: https://rss.art19.com/business-wars

item.title: Safe and Sound Strategies for a Liver Cleansing
item.description: So lots of our fitness troubles currently have their root reasons in a poor health liver that's congested. Our structures are genuinely swamped with poisonous materials on a day by day foundation, and when you consider that the primary activity with the liver is to purge some of these poisons, for almost all people specifically as we begin to become older the liver turns into swamped from this accumulation of sludge... Feed: https://media.rss.com/nutri-management/feed.xml
